title: Fernbank After Dark: Booze & Botanicals
location: Fernbank Museum of Natural History, 767 Clifton Rd NE, Atlanta
description: Adults-only (21+) after-hours museum experience featuring cocktails, botanical-themed drinks, tapas, live music, and science demos. Perfect for couples who love a sophisticated yet playful date night.

title: 90th Annual Atlanta Dogwood Festival - Day 1
description: Celebrating 90 years! 260+ artists, international music performances, food vendors, Kids Village, and live entertainment. Great for couples who enjoy art, music, and outdoor vibes.

title: Atlanta One Love Reggae Music Fest
location: Shirley Clarke Franklin Park - Birth of Atlanta Lot, 1660 Johnson Rd NW, Atlanta
description: Inaugural reggae festival with Reggae, Soca, Dancehall & Afrobeat vibes. Features world-class artists, authentic food vendors, art & jewelry, games, and picture booths. Over 3000 expected attendees. Kids 8 & under free.

title: Vegan Nights ATL: Taste the City
description: Atlanta's ultimate plant-based nightlife event with top vegan chefs, food trucks, craft cocktails, zero-proof mocktails, live DJs, fashion & art showcases. Indoor-outdoor experience. All ages welcome.

title: TUMBAO Dance Social - 2 Rooms: Salsa & Bachata
location: Academy Ballroom, 800 Miami Cir NE, Atlanta
description: Monthly dance social with two rooms - Salsa room with DJ Mike Arana and Bachata room with Guest DJ Urbane. Complimentary Salsa On2 class at 9:30 PM. BYOB. Great date night for dancing couples!

title: The Blues Is Alright Tour - Atlanta Blues Festival
location: Cobb Energy Performing Arts Centre, 2800 Cobb Galleria Pkwy, Atlanta
description: 20th Annual ATL Blues Festival featuring The Blues Is Alright Tour. An unforgettable night of blues music at Atlanta's premier intimate concert venue. Perfect for couples who love live music.

title: 90th Annual Atlanta Dogwood Festival - Day 2
description: Day 2 with full entertainment schedule including SALSAtlanta dance performance, Mausiki Scales & Common Ground Collective, Members Only (80s tribute), and more. Mimosa 5K at 7 AM.

title: 90th Annual Atlanta Dogwood Festival - Day 3
description: Final day featuring Nachlanta, Danceando & Friends, Chinese American Cultural Performing Group, Brandon Boone & The Reunion, and the Art Throwdown competition. Great Sunday outing for couples.

title: SweetWater 420 Fest - Day 1
description: Atlanta's signature spring music festival featuring major touring acts, multiple music stages, local performers, food & beverage vendors. One of the city's best-known annual festivals.

title: SweetWater 420 Fest - Day 2
description: Second day of Atlanta's premier spring music festival. Multiple stages, national and regional acts, craft beer from SweetWater Brewing Company, and large-scale outdoor programming.

title: Date Night Painting - Summer Moon River
location: Painting with a Twist, Kennesaw, GA
description: Couples-friendly painting class where you and your partner create beautiful art together. BYOB allowed. Perfect for a creative, relaxed date night with memories to take home.

title: Bachata x Zouk ATL Weekender 2026
location: 5522 New Peachtree Rd STE 103, Chamblee, GA
description: Three-day Bachata and Zouk dance festival with workshops, social dancing, and performances. Great opportunity for couples to learn or improve their dance skills together.

title: Helium Comedy Club - Guy Torry
location: Helium Comedy Club, 1157 Midtown Ave SE, Atlanta
description: Top Atlanta comedy club featuring nationally touring comedians. Great date night option for couples who enjoy laughing together.

title: Helium Comedy Club - Orion Levine
location: Helium Comedy Club, 1157 Midtown Ave SE, Atlanta
description: Weekend comedy show at Atlanta's premier stand-up venue. Perfect for couples looking for a fun night out with great food and laughs.

title: Let's Go Dancing: Paintings by Anna Jensen
description: Art exhibition featuring Anna Jensen's dancing-themed paintings at The Sun ATL. A great add-on to a night out or dinner date.
